pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Save the final model as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/turbine_blade.FCStd'
Task description specifies root profile at Z=0, tip profile at Z=100 mm. Height = 100.0 - 0.0 = 100.0 mm
Not explicitly stated in task description. However, 1.0 mm is reasonable tolerance (~1% of 100 mm height) for FreeCAD geometric operations

Analytical calculation: Task defines Loft between root ellipse (semi-major axis 20 mm, semi-minor axis 6 mm, area = 376.99 mm²) and tip ellipse (semi-major axis 12 mm, semi-minor axis 3 mm, area = 113.10 mm²) over height 100 mm. Volume integral: ∫[0-100] π(20-0.08z)(6-0.03z)dz = π × 7400 = 23,247.79 mm³. Rotation does not change volume, only spatial distribution.

Tolerance value appears arbitrary. Given the contradicted expected volume (5800 mm³ vs calculated 23,248 mm³), this tolerance range (5200-6400 mm³) is invalid and does not encompass the actual calculated volume.

Task specifies tip ellipse (semi-major 12 mm, semi-minor 3 mm) rotated 45° counter-clockwise around Z-axis. Rotating an ellipse (a=12, b=3) by 45° yields maximum Y-width of √[(12×sin(45°))² + (3×cos(45°))²] × 2 = √76.5 × 2 ≈ 17.49 mm. Threshold of 14.0 mm is reasonable for detecting twist (17.49 > 14.0), providing ~18% detection margin.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic FreeCAD model—a twisted turbine blade generated via Loft operation. Root profile: ellipse with semi-major axis 20 mm (X), semi-minor axis 6 mm (Y) at Z=0. Tip profile: ellipse with semi-major axis 12 mm, semi-minor axis 3 mm at Z=100 mm, rotated 45° counter-clockwise. Verified facts: output filename 'turbine_blade.FCStd', height of 100.0 mm (Z=0 to Z=100), and twist detection threshold of 14.0 mm (actual Y-width after rotation: ~17.49 mm). CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: Expected volume claimed as 5,800 mm³ but analytical integration yields ~23,248 mm³ (~4× larger). The discrepancy suggests the metadata volume values are incorrect.
